spec.name: The Sixth Trial Of Minos
spec.description: Dare we surmise how many more rooms Minos has? The paths appear to be endless. You shudder the sounds of death cries from the east. A loud voice bellows another warning: 'Leave now or face my wrath!' There is a crawlway leading upwards at the far end of the room and there is a fresh breeze comming from there.
